tasks.title: OAuth start endpoint with actor=app
tasks.description: Implement /oauth/start with state nonce, configured scopes, redirect URI, and actor=app.
acceptance: State nonce is generated and stored

tasks.title: OAuth callback and token storage
tasks.description: Implement /oauth/callback exchanging code for access+refresh tokens and persisting securely.
acceptance: Code exchange succeeds against Linear token endpoint
Access and refresh tokens are persisted atomically
Failure path does not leak secret values

tasks.title: Refresh token worker
tasks.description: Add proactive refresh worker using refresh_token grant before expiry.
acceptance: New token pair replaces prior pair safely
Refresh failures are observable via metrics/logs

tasks.title: Webhook signature validation
tasks.description: Implement Linear-Signature HMAC validation over raw body with constant-time compare.

tasks.title: Webhook replay-window guard
tasks.description: Enforce webhookTimestamp skew window and reject stale payloads.

tasks.title: Delivery idempotency store
tasks.description: Persist Linear-Delivery UUID and dedupe repeated events.

tasks.title: Issue claim and lock protocol
tasks.description: Implement lock label/comment and issue->run mapping to prevent double execution.
acceptance: Concurrent claims resolve to single run

tasks.title: Evidence comment writer
tasks.description: Publish standardized evidence comment with plan, PR, gates, and how_to_test.
acceptance: PR and gate links are included

tasks.title: Done transition gate
tasks.description: Enforce CI/post-merge evidence before moving issue to Done in Linear.
acceptance: Done transition denied when evidence is missing
Done transition succeeds when all required checks pass

tasks.title: DLQ and replay
tasks.description: Add dead-letter queue for failed webhook jobs and replay command.
acceptance: Non-recoverable failures are routed to DLQ
Replay command requeues with audit log
